calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Diana Kabaya, in propria persona, interested party.
No other appearances.

The court notes that the party appearing via Zoom did not formally provide notice to Plaintiff of their intent to appear this morning. The matter is discussed. At the conclusion of discussion, the court adopts its tentative ruling. The third-party claim is denied. Third party is the spouse of defendant debtor. It is presumed that the money in the joint accounts is community property and subject to collection. Third party has not presented evidence to overcome that presumption and shown that it is separate property. (See CCP 695.020; Family Code section 910; Family Code section 760; In re Marriage of Mix (1975)14 Cal.3d 604, 611; Marriage of Harrison (1986) 179 Cal.App.3d 1216, 1226.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Denied
